program_overview.definition: Research-focused degree for on-campus residential students interested in research careers or PhD study.

ms_thesis_path_1.requirements: Must secure HCI faculty member as major professor before admission.

ms_creative_component_path_2.description: Coursework + Capstone Project (27 credits course + 3 credit capstone).
ms_creative_component_path_2.requirements: No major professor required for admission. Not competitive (admitted if min reqs met).
ms_creative_component_path_2.funding: Self-funded (students responsible for tuition/fees). Assistantships not available.

comparisons.mhci_distance: Coursework-only (10 courses), professional degree for online students.
comparisons.ms_thesis_vs_creative: Thesis requires major professor/research interest; Creative Component is for those wanting MS without thesis/advisor focus.

prerequisites.undergraduate_degree: Must be equivalent to U.S. bachelor’s. 3-year degrees from India, Bangladesh, Canada (excluding Quebec), Nepal, Pakistan NOT accepted.

transcripts.requirement: Scanned copies of official transcripts/degree statements.
transcripts.india_specifics: College-issued mark sheets only from autonomous colleges; consolidated mark sheets must include all attempts; degree statements from university.

finding_major_professor.timing: Can apply without one, but required for admission (Thesis/PhD).
finding_major_professor.process: Contact faculty with research interests. Email should include background, interest in their work, start date, and funding request.

international_students.visa: I-20 issued after financial documentation confirms ability to cover expenses.
international_students.cpt_internship: Eligible after one academic year (Fall + Spring) enrollment. Student must secure own internship.
